title: Jakotens' Pokémon Trainer Cosmetics!
description: This resource pack includes custom hats and player skins for most playable characters from the main series Pokémon games from generations 1-8, perfect for roleplaying servers or with friends!
body:
For 1.21+: Install the .zip file to both your resourcepacks folder AND your world's datapacks folder to enable custom crafting recipes!

Command for 1.20.5 and ABOVE: /give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin[minecraft:custom_model_data=#]

Command for 1.20.4 and BELOW: /give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:#}


For versions of each hat without any hair, add the last digit of each number at the end again. (For example, Hilda's hat is code 502, but Hilda's hat without hair would be 5022)

Skins are included **separately** in the Trainer Skins zip file!

~ ~ ~

This resource pack includes custom hats and player skins for most playable characters from the main series Pokémon games from generations 1-8, perfect for roleplaying servers or with friends!

~ ~ ~

There are two versions of each hat: one with hair (to be used with each specific trainer skin) and one without (can be used with any skin with minimal clipping or visual bugs)

~ ~ ~

Currently only ONE version of each trainer (male and female) from each of the first 8 generations is included, even if some trainers have had multiple appearances. For example, Dawn in her appearance from Diamond and Pearl is included in the pack, but not Dawn from Platinum. Each of these trainer outfits was picked (somewhat arbitrarily) by me, but that doesn't mean others won't be added in the future! It all depends on when I find the time to update!

~ ~ ~

IMPORTANT TO NOTE:

As this resource pack only includes custom models, you must obtain the hats through commands. I would love to add these hats to a data pack or mod that lets players craft them in-game, but I personally just don't have the skillset to pull that off.
